name: Daily Operations
description: Daily operations dashboard and reporting for restaurant managers. Covers, sales, labor, and P&L at a glance.

page_briefs.dashboard: Dashboard KPI grid showing today's covers, sales, average check, labor cost percentage, food cost percentage, and margin. Chart grid visualizes hourly sales, labor vs sales, and week-over-week trends. Activity feed surfaces comps, voids, and manager overrides.
page_briefs.reports: Chart grid for period P&L, sales mix, daypart performance, and labor trends. Data table below lists generated reports (daily sales, labor, food cost, tax) with date range, status, and download action.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with main content area for operations reporting
